_notes: Block names are case-sensitive in DXF. confidence_note explains special handling. v1.1: Added blocks from S1, S2, S3 unknown block analysis.

_changelog.v1.1: Added 16 new blocks from S1/S2/S3 analysis (total: 30 blocks). Also added flow direction arrows and non-HVAC blocks to skip list.

*U19.confidence_note: Overcounts vs BOQ. Use MTEXT 'SAD' label count instead when available.

*U16.confidence_note: Perfect match to BOQ in S5/S6.

*U17.description: Extract diffuser — but Nestor confirmed: under AC system, treat as Return Air Diffuser (RAD)
*U17.confidence_note: Same count as *U16. Per Nestor: 'If extract air diffuser is labeled under AC system, it shall be considered as a Return Air Diffuser (RAD).'

VCD 200.description: Circular VCD at flexible duct branch from main duct, serving supply air diffuser
VCD 200.confidence_note: Maps to 'Supply Volume Damper (SVD)' in BOQ per Nestor.

*U20.description: Alternate block for VCD 200 — exact same count. Two VCD types exist: circular (by diameter) and rectangular (by duct size).
*U20.confidence_note: Duplicate count with VCD 200 — do NOT double-count. Use VCD 200 as primary.

*U5.description: Wall-mounted thermostat. Quantity should equal total FCU count (wall-mounted + ducted).
*U5.confidence_note: Undercounts ~20% in S5 (136 vs 170 BOQ). Layer-based count is more reliable.

ARGD 18.description: Ducted-type FCU block. Per Nestor (Mar 12): appears to function as a generic block name, interpreted as a ducted-type FCU.
ARGD 18.confidence_note: Reclassified from null (suppressed) to fcu/ducted per Nestor round 3. 166 items = exact ducted FCU count.

AC SPLIT.description: Wall-mounted FCU (split type). 170 FCUs total = 166 ducted + 4 wall-mounted.
AC SPLIT.confidence_note: Reclassified from indoor_unit to fcu per Nestor. 4 units in S5.

A$C19F659CD.description: Auto-generated block name — corresponds to AC indoor units. Count excludes legend unit to match BOQ.
A$C19F659CD.confidence_note: Per Nestor: 'This refers specifically to the AC equipment.' Excludes unit indicated in legend.

LFD.description: Fire damper block (Project 3 Villa). 146 found on drawings, ZERO in BOQ.
LFD.confidence_note: Nestor confirmed. NOTE: Short named block (3 chars) — engine skips these in Tier 2 to prevent cross-project false positives. Will appear in unknowns for per-project verification.

vcd.description: VCD block (lowercase, Project 3). Different naming convention from S5/S6.
vcd.confidence_note: Project 3 used lowercase block names. NOTE: Short named block — skipped in Tier 2.

DFD.description: Fire damper (duct fire damper) block — Project 4. 140 generic + 13 sized (FD-300, FD-250, FD-400).
DFD.confidence_note: Nestor confirmed. NOTE: Short named block — skipped in Tier 2.

$0$$0$$0$vcdd.description: Generic VCD block. Confirmed as VCD via AutoCAD block definition.
$0$$0$$0$vcdd.confidence_note: VCD already counted reliably via layer detection (1,040). This block entry is for dictionary completeness.

R S.description: Return air diffuser block — abbreviated as 'R S' (Return Side). 209 found in S2.
R S.confidence_note: S2 BOQ has flow bar slot diffusers (supply/return pairs) + volume dampers. This block likely represents return air terminals. Needs Nestor confirmation.

A S.description: Supply air diffuser block — abbreviated as 'A S' (Air Supply). 110 found in S2.
A S.confidence_note: S2 BOQ has flow bar slot diffusers (supply/return pairs). This block likely represents supply air terminals. Needs Nestor confirmation.

AC-03.description: AC indoor unit model designation. 33 found in S2.
AC-03.confidence_note: Named as AC unit model number. Needs Nestor confirmation for exact equipment category.

300x300 R DIFF.description: 300x300mm return air diffuser. Self-descriptive block name.
300x300 R DIFF.confidence_note: Block name explicitly states dimensions and type. High confidence.

RETURN AIR DIFFUSER.description: Return air diffuser block. Self-descriptive name. 9 found in S2.

300x300 DIFF.description: 300x300mm diffuser (assumed supply — return has explicit 'R' prefix). 8 found in S2.
300x300 DIFF.confidence_note: No explicit S/R designation but by convention, if 'R DIFF' is return, plain 'DIFF' is supply. Needs Nestor confirmation.

600 L P S.description: 600mm linear plenum supply diffuser. 8 found in S2. S2 BOQ lists multiple flow bar slot diffusers.
600 L P S.confidence_note: L P S = Linear Plenum Supply. Maps to flow bar / linear slot diffuser category in BOQ. Needs Nestor confirmation.

Centrifugal.description: Centrifugal fan block. 4 found in S2. S2 BOQ lists smoke extract fan, makeup air fan, toilet extract fans.
Centrifugal.confidence_note: Generic fan type. Could be exhaust or supply fan. Needs Nestor confirmation.

SOUND.description: Sound attenuator block. 2 found in S2.
SOUND.confidence_note: Short block name but descriptive. S2 doesn't list sound attenuators in BOQ — this is a 'found on drawing but not in BOQ' item.

RETURN GRILL.description: Return grille block. 2 found in S2. Maps to return air grille in BOQ.

supply.description: Supply air diffuser block (generic name). 2 found in S2.
supply.confidence_note: Very generic name. Likely supply air terminal. Needs Nestor confirmation. NOTE: Short named block — may be skipped in Tier 2.

RXYTQ-TYF.description: Daikin VRF outdoor unit model (RXYTQ series). 23 found across S3 drawings. S3 BOQ lists 16 VRF units.
RXYTQ-TYF.confidence_note: Daikin model number is industry-recognizable. RXYTQ = VRV/VRF outdoor unit. Count may differ from BOQ because drawings show units across all floors (including duplicates in reflected ceiling plans).

EXAUST AIR DIFFUSER.description: Exhaust/extract air diffuser block. 15 found in S3. Note: misspelled 'EXAUST' instead of 'EXHAUST'.
EXAUST AIR DIFFUSER.confidence_note: Self-descriptive despite typo. Maps to extract air diffuser category.

RADIFFUSER.description: Return Air Diffuser block (concatenated name). 9 found in S3.
RADIFFUSER.confidence_note: RA = Return Air. Self-descriptive despite concatenated format.

return opening.description: Return air opening block. 7 found in S3. Represents return air grille/opening.
return opening.confidence_note: Likely a return air grille or opening. Needs Nestor confirmation for exact classification.

ACOUSTIC ELBOW.description: Acoustic elbow fitting block. 7 found in S3. Duct fitting with acoustic lining.
ACOUSTIC ELBOW.confidence_note: Acoustic fitting — related to noise control. Maps to sound attenuator / acoustic fitting category.

VOLUME CONTROL DAMPER 1.description: Volume control damper block. 9 found in S1. S1 BOQ lists 98 VCDs.
VOLUME CONTROL DAMPER 1.confidence_note: Fully descriptive block name. High confidence.

skip_blocks._description: Blocks that are NOT HVAC equipment. Engine should ignore these entirely to prevent false positives.

F.description: Likely furniture or annotation symbol — too generic to classify

T.description: Likely text or title block symbol — too generic to classify

FA WIRE MESH.description: Fire alarm wire mesh — electrical, not HVAC

CAP.description: Pipe cap or end cap — plumbing, not HVAC

needs_nestor_review._description: Blocks that need Nestor's expertise to identify. Grouped by sample.

S1.*X142 (70): Highest count unknown block in S1. Needs visual identification.
S1.*U212 (66): Anonymous block — could be diffuser or other equipment.
S1.*U86 (54): Anonymous block — could be diffuser or other equipment.
S1.PACKAGE1300 Ls (9): Likely packaged AC unit 1300 LPS. Needs confirmation.

S3.SA (14): Possibly Supply Air diffuser. Needs confirmation.
S3.MS-30 (13): Possibly duct silencer / sound attenuator model. Needs confirmation.
S3.ADF1 (4): Possibly Air Diffuser model. Needs confirmation.
S3.AR1 (4): Unknown — possibly air register. Needs confirmation.
S3.DFDFF (3): Possibly fire damper variant? Needs confirmation.

S4.*U2164 (125): Highest count block in S4 — critical to identify.

A$C.description: Auto-generated blocks. Most are NOT equipment — only A$C19F659CD confirmed as indoor units.
A$C.confidence_note: Per Nestor: other A$C prefix blocks are 'Not an equipment.'

*U.description: Unnamed/anonymous blocks. Many are equipment. Must check against specific known *U blocks.
*U.confidence_note: Each *U block must be individually identified.

FD-.description: Fire damper with size suffix (e.g., FD-300, FD-250, FD-400).

FCU-.description: Fan coil unit with zone/number suffix.

DIFF.description: Diffuser variants — block names containing DIFF are likely diffusers.
DIFF.confidence_note: Need to check for R/RETURN prefix to classify as return vs supply.

DAMPER.confidence_note: Could be VCD, fire damper, or motorized damper. Needs context.

supply_diffuser.notes: SAD = Supply Air Diffuser. Count occurrences (not unique labels — SAD is same text repeated). Nestor confirmed this is the reliable count method for *U19.

fcu.notes: Count occurrences of FCU labels. In S5: FCU-01 (88x), FCU-02 (40x), FCU-03 (24x), FCU-4 (4x) = 156 total. BOQ target 170.

vrf.notes: Changed to count_occurrences: each VRV/VRF label on drawing represents one physical unit/module. VRV-1 appearing 5 times = 5 modules of that system.

flow_bar.notes: Per Nestor: can be polylines, blocks, or annotations. Patterns expanded to catch FB abbreviations and various spacing. If count still low, flow bars may be drawn as polylines without text labels.

plenum_box.notes: Per Nestor (Mar 12): 96 plenum boxes in S5, measured in sqm not nos. Often incorporated into supply air duct quantity in conventional takeoff.

extract_diffuser.notes: EAD = Extract Air Diffuser. Added EXAUST pattern for misspellings found in S3. Per Nestor: under AC system, these are often Return Air Diffusers (RADs).

volume_control_damper.notes: Catches VCD text labels on drawings. Rectangular VCDs may only appear as text labels (e.g., VCD 250x250) without dedicated blocks.

flexible_duct.notes: Per Nestor: quantified as max 1m per air terminal, with diameters 150/200/250/300mm.

linear_slot_diffuser.notes: Added in v1.1. S2 and S3 BOQs both list linear slot diffusers. S2 has flow bar slot diffusers, S3 has 'Leniar slot diffuser' (sic). This catches text-based references.

disk_valve.notes: Added in v1.1. S1 and S3 BOQs list 150mm disk valves for toilet exhaust. Maps to extract_diffuser category.

duplicate_block_groups._description: Blocks that represent the same physical items. Only the primary block count is used.
duplicate_block_groups.reason: VCD 200 and *U20 are alternate blocks for the same circular VCDs. Count VCD 200 only.
Both blocks represent the same return air diffusers. *U17 is the under-AC extract label for the same physical item.

vcd_types._nestor_note: Per Nestor Q3 (March 2026): Two types of VCD in Sample 5. Circular = 240, Rectangular = 800, Total = 1,040.

circular.location: Connection point where flexible duct branches from main duct, serving supply air diffuser
circular.sizing: Based on airflow requirements and duct configuration

rectangular.description: Size corresponds to AC duct size (250x250mm in Sample 5)
rectangular.block_names_note: No specific block identified yet — count inferred from layer total minus circular count

thermostat_equals_fcu.description: Thermostat count should equal total FCU count (wall-mounted + ducted)
thermostat_equals_fcu.source: Nestor confirmed: 'quantity of thermostats shall correspond to the total quantity of FCUs for both types'

fire_dampers_at_penetrations.description: Fire dampers should exist where ducts penetrate fire-rated walls/slabs
fire_dampers_at_penetrations.source: Nestor: 'typically included in HVAC drawings where duct passes through fire-rated wall'

standard_practice_items.description: Items that should be in BOQ even if not on drawings
standard_practice_items.source: Nestor: 'for accurate takeoff, it is important to include these items'
